calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Aquilina.
Arnold Evje II, Esq., for Plaintiff: City Housing, Inc.
No appearance by the Defendant: Andre Richardson.
09:50 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Mr. Cativo the desk clerk, Herman Taft, jr., and Ruth Clarke the authorized agent were sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Notice to pay or quit --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 459 Turk St., #207, San Francisco.
No money damages.
Costs per cost bill.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Paul Perdue, Court Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, No reporter

Appearances: Arnold Walter Evje, Esq. for plaintiff
Defendant, Andre Richardson in pro per

Off calendar from settlement calendar. Case did not settle. Trial date remains.
